payload.answer: Conflict detected: Sam from Goldman cannot simultaneously have two children and no children. Preserve both statements as conflicting and do not treat either as current.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman has two children
New input: Sam from Goldman has no children
payload.decision: Do not overwrite either fact; mark the relationship as conflicting and unresolved.

entity_resolution.reason: The inputs refer to the same apparent person, but the child-count assertions are mutually exclusive and neither can be safely superseded without additional evidence.

payload.intent: Explain and preserve a contradiction between two statements about Sam from Goldman’s children.

memory_cards.statement: Existing memory says Sam from Goldman has two children, while the new input says Sam from Goldman has no children.

details: Preserved ambiguity rather than asserting a current fact.

repair_options: Ask for clarification about whether these refer to the same Sam from Goldman.
